Initializing Shards

暂缓分配的分片数量，当节点丢失，会发生选主和数据拷贝。为了较少网络抖动等原因导致:
Number of shards whose allocation is delayed. When a node is lost, primary election and data copying take place. To reduce reallocation caused by network jitter and similar issues, the delay parameter is configured; this value is the number of shards waiting for the delay to expire before being reallocated
Shards delayed to reduce reallocation overhead
未分配的分片数量\nThe number of shards that exis:
Unassigned Shards
The number of shards that exist in the cluster state, but cannot be found in the cluster itself
活跃主分片数\nThe number of primary shards in:
Active Primary Shards
The number of primary shards in your cluster. This is an aggregate total across all indices.
活跃分片数\nAggregate total of all shards acr:
Active Shards
Aggregate total of all shards across all indices, which includes replica shards
绿色：健康，黄色：存在副本分片异常，红色：存在主分片异常: Green: healthy, Yellow: some replica shards abnormal, Red: some primary shards abnormal
节点文档总数，不包含已删除文档和子文档以及刚索引的文档: Total documents on the node, excluding deleted documents, nested documents and documents that were just indexed
迁移中分片数量\nThe number of shards that are c:
Relocating Shards
The number of shards that are currently moving from one node to another node.
预估内存大小和限制内存大小: Estimated Memory Size and Memory Limit
